svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="2"> <diagram name="Cosmos3 AWS Architecture" id="cosmos3-aws-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="912" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1240" pageHeight="860" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="Cosmos 3 Model Factory — AWS Architecture (Amazon EKS / SageMaker HyperPod)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="840" x="200" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cluster" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#f0f7ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="Kubernetes control plane (Amazon EKS · SageMaker HyperPod-EKS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="800" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="compute" parent="cluster" style="swimlane;startSize=26;html=1;fillColor=#eef7ee;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="GPU compute — p5en.48xlarge node pool (8× H200, EFA/RDMA)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="760" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="train" parent="compute" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>Post-train</b><br>JobSet / PyTorchJob<br>FSDP2 + Ulysses CP<br><i>action-policy fine-tune · vision SFT&nbsp;</i><div><i>(full &amp; LoRA)</i><br>async DCP checkpoints</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="220" x="20" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gen" parent="compute" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>Generate (SDG)</b><br>vLLM-Omni server<br>Cosmos3-Super (64B)<br><i>T2I · I2V · V2V</i><br>multi-GPU diffusion parallelism<br>(CFG × Ulysses × HSDP)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="220" x="520" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="serve" parent="compute" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>Evaluate / Serve</b><br>policy server<br>Deployment + Service<br>Cosmos3-Nano-Policy<br><i>single-GPU replicas</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="220" x="270" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="guard" parent="compute" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="NVIDIA Cosmos Guardrail — safety filter for generation &amp; serving" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="470" x="270" y="228" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2gen" edge="1" parent="compute" source="guard" style="html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="gen"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2serve" edge="1" parent="compute" source="guard" style="html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="serve"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="resil" parent="cluster" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>Resilience &amp; scheduling</b> — Framework auto-resumes from the latest DCP checkpoint on restart · <b>EKS:</b> JobSet failurePolicy: Recreate (recreate pods on failure) · <b>HyperPod:</b> node auto-replacement + job auto-resume + deep-health node affinity (Schedulable required, deep-health preferred)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="760" x="20" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="obs" parent="cluster" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>Observability</b> — NVIDIA GPU-Operator DCGM exporter → Prometheus (EKS) / Amazon Managed Prometheus (HyperPod AMP) ·&nbsp;<div>&nbsp;GPU saturation (SM-active) + goodput (productive-time fraction)</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="760" x="20" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="image" parent="cluster" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>Container image (Amazon ECR)</b> — AWS DLC base (PyTorch 2.10 / cu130, matched EFA + aws-ofi-nccl)&nbsp;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="760" x="20" y="485" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storage" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#fbf1f7;strokeColor=#333333;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="Storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="330" x="889" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="storage" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>Amazon S3</b><br>data lake — raw + synthetic corpus<br><i>Mountpoint (read) · checkpoint archive</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="200" x="60" y="372" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fsx" parent="storage" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<b>FSx for Lustre + EFA</b><br>hot training corpus, checkpoints,<br>HF cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="220" x="50" y="202" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nvme" parent="storage" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<div><b><br></b></div><b>Local NVMe (instance store)</b><br>RAID0 scratch — generation write path<br><i>async copy back to FSx / S3</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="50" y="42" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dra" edge="1" parent="storage" source="s3" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;align=center;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="fsx" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop" edge="1" parent="storage" source="nvme" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#666666;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;strokeWidth=2;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="160" y="202" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="165.4545454545455" y="142.0000000000001" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="160" y="201.9999999999999" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rbkijbqyOhdl1ioP6hgv-1" parent="storage" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontFamily=Architects Daughter;fontSource=https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.googleapis.com%2Fcss%3Ffamily%3DArchitects%2BDaughter;labelBackgroundColor=default;fontSize=10;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<i style="font-family: Helvetica;">S3→FSx data-repository association (DRA)</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="250" x="35" y="328" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rbkijbqyOhdl1ioP6hgv-2" parent="storage" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontFamily=Architects Daughter;fontSource=https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.googleapis.com%2Fcss%3Ffamily%3DArchitects%2BDaughter;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<span style="font-family: Helvetica; font-size: 10px; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">read corpus /&nbsp;</span><div style="font-family: Helvetica; font-size: 10px; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;">l<span style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">oad+save ckpt</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="70" x="-40" y="222" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rbkijbqyOhdl1ioP6hgv-3" parent="storage" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontFamily=Architects Daughter;fontSource=https%3A%2F%2Ffonts.googleapis.com%2Fcss%3Ffamily%3DArchitects%2BDaughter;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value="<span style="font-family: Helvetica; font-size: 10px; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">closed loop: synthetic clips re-enter the corpus → next post-train round</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="310" x="8" y="154" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fsx2train" edge="1" parent="1" source="fsx" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0909" y="-25" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <mxPoint x="820" y="317" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gen2nvme" edge="1" parent="1" source="gen" style="html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;rounded=0;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" target="nvme" value="write synthetic clips"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2202" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="690" y="150" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
